notes: SHIP v1.14.212 — RECONCILE web-Claude .204 SUPERSET (files51). My .204 adopt (9605a9b, from files49) was an 11-hunk PARTIAL; files51's .204 diff is the 14-hunk superset. Three web-Claude .204 fixes my .205-.211 line never had, semantically re-anchored into .211 (the .diff was against web-Claude's .203 line numbers on a now-divergent file, so applied by meaning, not mechanically). (1) B1 ROOT FIX: added body.rd #pg-work:not(.wk-grid) #wk-deploy:has(.msc-actions){transform:none!important} — nulls the lingering rf-fade identity transform so #wk-deploy stops being a containing block and the sticky .msc-actions scope-picker bar resolves to the viewport (was floating over cab rows and eating taps → selection stuck at 0). My line previously fixed the SAME bug a different way (padding-shrink to 71px, v1.14.116); this root fix supersedes that hack. (2) LAST-ROW CLIP: with the root fix in place the padding is now a comfortable reserve — #pg-work:has(.msc-actions) padding-bottom 71px+safe -> calc(var(--tabnav-h)+96px), .msc-foot-pad 88px -> 112px; fixes the last cab row (dh6:050) sitting flush against / clipped by the nav on short viewports. #1+#2 are COUPLED (taking the bigger padding without the root fix would re-break the tap bug) — shipped together. (3) rf-back-btn REDESIGN (opt-4 small-soft-square, fleet-wide, cosmetic, owner-approved): 56px box -> 56px hit target with visible chrome shrunk to a 34px chip via ::before so BACK stops out-weighing header actions; icon slate (var --slate-readable #8AAFBF), lights cyan on :active (icon + chip border). Affects every .rf-back-btn (Work tools, Ref, Platforms back). Only two .rf-back-btn style rules existed (no conflicts); --slate-readable confirmed defined. Zero change to markup, JS, or legacy: all three are body.rd-scoped CSS (rf-back-btn base rule is shared but the redesign only restyles chrome; legacy renders the same button element — the box->chip is a visual change in BOTH houses by nature of the shared class, consistent with web-Claude's fleet-wide intent). Gates: node --check x4 inline blocks + sw.js · CSS braces balanced · CRLF preserved · three-stamp lockstep .211->.212. ROLLBACK: git revert. SHIP-ORDER NOTE: 11th ship in the open BATCH-VERIFY batch (.202-.212) — well past the 6-cap; owner directed this reconcile + continued the stack 2026-07-08. On-device pass for .202-.212 still owed by owner. DEVICE-VERIFY CHECKLIST: (a) Work > Deploy > STAGE SCOPE: tap cab rows -> selection count increments (bar no longer eats taps); STAGE SCOPE SNAPSHOT enables; (b) scroll to the last cab row (e.g. dh6:050) -> fully visible above the nav, not clipped, on a short viewport; (c) sticky action bar still pins directly above the bottom nav; (d) every BACK button (Work tool, Crash Cart drill-in, Platforms drill-in) shows the smaller 34px rounded chip, slate chevron; (e) press-and-hold a BACK button -> chevron + chip border light cyan; (f) BACK still navigates correctly and the 56px tap area still catches gloved taps; (g) ?legacy=1: no functional regressions (msc rules body.rd-scoped; back-button chrome restyle is shared-class cosmetic).
